local-main-codex.description: The current interactive Codex session. Use for Mission Control and M001 until aisw providers are configured.

codex-ucl.command_template: bash -lc 'aisw use codex ucl --state-mode isolated --non-interactive --quiet; cd {worktree}; codex exec --json --sandbox workspace-write --cd {worktree} "$(cat {prompt_file})" > {run_dir}/events.jsonl 2> {run_dir}/stderr.log'
codex-ucl.description: Preferred stored aisw Codex profile for isolated medium worker launches.

codex-ibl.command_template: bash -lc 'aisw use codex ibl --state-mode isolated --non-interactive --quiet; cd {worktree}; codex exec --json --sandbox workspace-write --cd {worktree} "$(cat {prompt_file})" > {run_dir}/events.jsonl 2> {run_dir}/stderr.log'
codex-ibl.description: Stored aisw Codex profile. Available for isolated worker launches; not the active profile during M010 inventory.

codex-adikia.command_template: bash -lc 'aisw use codex adikia --state-mode isolated --non-interactive --quiet; cd {worktree}; codex exec --json --sandbox workspace-write --cd {worktree} "$(cat {prompt_file})" > {run_dir}/events.jsonl 2> {run_dir}/stderr.log'
codex-adikia.description: Active aisw Codex profile during M010 inventory; credentials present.

claude-main.command_template: bash -lc 'aisw use claude main --state-mode isolated --non-interactive --quiet; cd {worktree}; claude -p --output-format stream-json --permission-mode acceptEdits "$(cat {prompt_file})" > {run_dir}/events.jsonl 2> {run_dir}/stderr.log'
claude-main.description: Active aisw Claude profile during M010 inventory; credentials present. Use only for approved bounded missions.

notes: Installed aisw uses `aisw use <tool> <profile>` rather than the bootstrap template's `aisw context use` syntax.
M010 safe inventory found a real Claude profile named `main`; the former placeholder has been replaced by provider `claude-main`.
No credential contents were read or recorded.
